title: Section 23H
content: 1[23H. Procedure of Authority.--The Authority shall, subject to the provisions of this Chapter, have power to regulate its own procedure in all matters arising out of the exercise of its powers under this Act.]
footnote: 1. New Chapter III-A consisting of Ss. 23-A to 23-H ins. by Act 27 of 1999, S. 124.
